case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. CRISTIAN URIEL LOPEZ PEREZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ PEREZ, CRISTIAN URIEL $1,389.35 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,459.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,389.35 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ PEREZ, CRISTIAN URIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ PEREZ, CRISTIAN URIEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ-LEGAL ASST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
